1.Name: Shadow Hunter
1.Description:
Locate the transformed Stalkers and attack them using your weapons and skills. A Stalker is defeated when their HP reaches zero.
Victory Condition: Defeat all Stalkers.
Upon becoming a Shadow Hunter, you automatically gain the following exclusive skills:
1.SkillText: Added items will be deducted after the <style="physical">faction confirmation phase </style>. You gain the corresponding skill, which <style="physical">lasts for a single match</style>. To use it in the next match, the item must be consumed again.

2.Name: Stalker
2.Description:
Use the Transform skill to turn into objects in the scene. Hide in suitable spots to confuse Shadow Hunters, or move frequently to avoid their attacks.
Victory Condition: At least one Stalker survives until time runs out.
Becoming a Stalker automatically grants the following exclusive skills:
2.SkillText: Added items will be deducted after the <style="physical">faction confirmation phase </style>. You gain the corresponding skill, which <style="physical">lasts for a single match</style>. To use it in the next match, the item must be consumed again.
